message:
Running command: # The 8afc8346 hash isn't hardcoded in librelane Python. 
# It must come from a PDK config file. Let's check the PDK's own config
find /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af -name "*.json" | head -5
cat /nc/pdk/ciel/sky130/versions/0fe599b2afb6708d281543108caf8310912f54af/sky130A/.config/nodeinfo.json | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(json.dumps(d,indent=2))" 2>/dev/null | head -20
